title: Smoky Charred Venezuelan Fiordilatte Tagine
description: A unique tagine dish featuring smoked fiordilatte, fermented kimchi, and a blend of Venezuelan spices.

ingredients.name: Venezuelan spice blend
ingredients.notes: including cumin, coriander, and chili peppers

instructions: Heat the coconut oil in a large tagine pot over medium heat.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic and saut9 over 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the ferment kimchi and cook for 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Add the crumbled fiordilatte cheese, Venezuelan spice blend, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the diced chili peppers and stir to combine.
Add 1 cup of water to the tagine pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the flavors have melded together.
Stir in the chopped cilantro and lime juice.
Serve the Smoky Charred Venezuelan Fiordilatte Tagine hot, garnished with additional cilantro if desired.
